Description: Maintain authoritative inventory of on-prem, cloud, and SaaS assets with ownership and criticality tags.
Track approved software and package dependencies; generate SBOM for tier-1 systems.
Classify data into Public/Internal/Confidential/Restricted with handling requirements.
Document critical services, supporting systems, and impact tolerances.
Assess supplier security posture pre-contract and annually thereafter.
Maintain and review security policies, standards, and exceptions quarterly.
Automate joiner/mover/leaver workflows and periodic access recertification.
Vault, rotate, and monitor privileged credentials and sessions.
Enforce phishing-resistant MFA for workforce and administrative access.
Segment production, user, and management networks with policy enforcement.
Apply secure CIS-aligned baseline and drift detection for endpoints.
Scan internal/external assets weekly and track SLA-based remediation.
Deploy critical patches within 14 days and high-risk patches within 30 days.
Encrypt production data stores and key management through centralized KMS.
Require TLS 1.2+ for external/internal service communications.
Embed threat modeling, SAST, dependency scanning, and security gates in CI/CD.
Run role-based awareness and phishing simulations with KPI reporting.
Protect backup integrity and retention with immutable storage for critical workloads.
Aggregate logs from identity, endpoint, network, and cloud platforms.
Maintain prioritized detection use cases mapped to ATT&CK techniques.
Deploy EDR to workforce and server fleet with tamper protection.
Enable CSPM and cloud-native audit logging for all production accounts.
Establish UEBA models for anomalous logins and data access patterns.
Track log source health, ingestion latency, and parsing error rates.
Maintain and test IR plan with defined roles, severity matrix, and escalation.
Standardize triage, containment, eradication, and lessons learned process.
Run quarterly cross-functional cyber tabletop exercises.
Define notification decision tree and legal/comms playbooks.
Maintain DR strategy with RTO/RPO for tier-1 services.
Execute semiannual recovery tests and track remediation actions.
Define internal/external communications templates for major incidents.
Track corrective actions from incidents to closure in governance forum.
